testcase.name: setup

failure.message: expected [Green Team Holdings, LLC. - ENV: demo-gcd - IP: 172.31.67.247 - DIR: production - DB: aurora-prod1.cluster-ckzqgma55mu9.us-east-2.rds.amazonaws.com ] but found [Green Team Holdings, LLC. - ENV: demo-gcd - IP: 172.31.62.178 - DIR: production - DB: aurora-prod1.cluster-ckzqgma55mu9.us-east-2.rds.amazonaws.com]
